flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Beacon College are 39% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($29.4k vs $48.4k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.4% at Beacon College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($18.5k debt amortized over 10 years vs $29.4k earnings).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Beacon College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.9k → $51.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Beacon College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.9k → $51.7k).
